name: ccharness
description: ccharness — a product harness for Claude Code, a diverge → decide → build funnel: /point-it (rank where a product could go next), /grill-it (think one fork to ONE answer), /implement-it (drive one task to done), /slap (reset when a fix is stuck), /autopilot (run the whole funnel in a never-stop loop).

plugins.name: ccharness
plugins.description: A product harness — a diverge → decide → build funnel. /point-it surveys a product and ranks where it could go next (capturing the product's North Star on first run); /grill-it thinks a fork-laden decision through to ONE reasoned answer; /implement-it drives one well-scoped task from understood → built → verified → committed through a gated 0→6 pipeline; /slap resets a stuck fix; /autopilot runs the entire funnel in a continuous loop that stops only on /autopilot-cancel. Zero-config.
